scripts.android:apk:debug: node ../../scripts/run-with-expo-env.mjs customer-app "bash ../../packages/mobile-config/scripts/prebuild-android.sh customer-app" && node ../../scripts/run-with-expo-env.mjs customer-app "cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug"
scripts.android:apk:uat: node ../../scripts/run-with-expo-env.mjs customer-app "bash ../../packages/mobile-config/scripts/prebuild-android.sh customer-app" && node ../../scripts/run-with-expo-env.mjs customer-app "cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease" && node ../../scripts/rename-uat-apk.mjs customer-app release
scripts.ios:uat: npm run brand:sync && node ../../scripts/run-with-expo-env.mjs customer-app "npx eas-cli build --profile uat --platform ios"
scripts.ios:uat:local: npm run brand:sync && node ../../scripts/run-with-expo-env.mjs customer-app "npx eas-cli build --profile uat --platform ios --local"
scripts.deploy: npx expo export -p web && npx eas-cli@latest deploy
